---
title: "Marginal costs summary by subclass"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This notebook provides a summary of bill components by subclass.

After ingest, the diagnostic cell prints the S3 path, column count, full schema, and `head(3)` — enough to confirm paths and hive reads without a full-table row count (which would scan every row).

**Scope:** CAIRO outputs for **run 1+2** only (`comb_bills_year_target` and `cross_subsidization_BAT_values`).

## Parameters and paths

```{python}
#| label: params-paths

from __future__ import annotations

import polars as pl
from great_tables import GT

# Match `notebooks/analysis.qmd` — change these when you switch runs.
STATE = "RI"
BATCH = "ri_20260323_r1-16"

_state_lower = STATE.lower()
S3_BASE = "s3://data.sb/switchbox/cairo/outputs/hp_rates"
PATH_MASTER_BILLS_12 = f"{S3_BASE}/{_state_lower}/all_utilities/{BATCH}/run_1+2/comb_bills_year_target/"
PATH_MASTER_BAT_12 = f"{S3_BASE}/{_state_lower}/all_utilities/{BATCH}/run_1+2/cross_subsidization_BAT_values/"

S3_OPTS: dict[str, str] = {"aws_region": "us-west-2"}
```



## BAT values — run 1+2 (lazy)

```{python}
#| label: ingest-bat-12

bat_12 = pl.scan_parquet(PATH_MASTER_BAT_12, hive_partitioning=True, storage_options=S3_OPTS)
```

```{python}
#| label: diagnostic-bat-12

HEATING_TYPE_COL = "postprocess_group.heating_type"

# Materialize once: .collect() returns a DataFrame; the lazy frame is unchanged if you don't assign.
bat_12_df = bat_12.collect()
print(bat_12_df.head(3))

# BAT tables use heating_type + fuel flags (see `bat-ingest` in analysis.qmd) — there is no `heats_with_electricity`.
hp_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col(HEATING_TYPE_COL) == "heat_pump")
electric_resistance_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col(HEATING_TYPE_COL) == "electrical_resistance")
natgas_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col("heats_with_natgas"))
oil_propane_bldgs = bat_12_df.filter(pl.col("heats_with_oil") | pl.col("heats_with_propane"))

print(f"Total buildings: {bat_12_df.height}")
print(f"Heat pump buildings: {hp_bldgs.height}")
print(f"Electric resistance buildings: {electric_resistance_bldgs.height}")
print(f"Natural gas buildings: {natgas_bldgs.height}")
print(f"Oil/propane buildings: {oil_propane_bldgs.height}")
```

```{python}
#| label: delivery-cos-summary-table

def _weighted_sum(df: pl.DataFrame, col: str, w_col: str = "weight") -> float:
    """Sum of (value × survey weight) — population-scaled total for the sample."""
    if df.is_empty():
        return float("nan")
    return float((df[col] * df[w_col]).sum())


def delivery_cos_weighted_sum(df: pl.DataFrame) -> float:
    """Total (economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery) × weight."""
    x = df.with_columns(
        (pl.col("economic_burden_delivery") + pl.col("residual_share_delivery")).alias("delivery_cos"),
    )
    return _weighted_sum(x, "delivery_cos")


_rows: list[dict] = []
for group_label, d in [
    ("Heat pump", hp_bldgs),
    ("Electric resistance", electric_resistance_bldgs),
    ("Natural gas", natgas_bldgs),
    ("Oil / propane", oil_propane_bldgs),
]:
    total = delivery_cos_weighted_sum(d)
    _rows.append({
        "group": group_label,
        "total_delivery_cos": round(total, 2),
    })

_delivery_cos_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_rows)
print(
    "\n economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery — Σ (value × weight) ($/yr)\n"
)
print(_delivery_cos_tbl)
```

```{python}
#| label: annual-bill-delivery-summary-table

_rows_bill: list[dict] = []
for group_label, d in [
    ("Heat pump", hp_bldgs),
    ("Electric resistance", electric_resistance_bldgs),
    ("Natural gas", natgas_bldgs),
    ("Oil / propane", oil_propane_bldgs),
]:
    total = _weighted_sum(d, "annual_bill_delivery")
    _rows_bill.append({
        "group": group_label,
        "total_annual_bill_delivery": round(total, 2),
    })

_annual_bill_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_rows_bill)
print("\n annual_bill_delivery — Σ (value × weight) ($/yr)\n")
print(_annual_bill_tbl)
```

```{python}
#| label: bill-minus-cos-diff-table

# Second table minus first: annual_bill_delivery total − delivery COS total (same groups, same order).
_diff_rows: list[dict] = []
for cos_row, bill_row in zip(_rows, _rows_bill, strict=True):
    assert cos_row["group"] == bill_row["group"]
    _diff_rows.append({
        "group": cos_row["group"],
        "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos": round(
            bill_row["total_annual_bill_delivery"] - cos_row["total_delivery_cos"],
            2,
        ),
    })

_diff_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_diff_rows)
print(
    "\n annual_bill_delivery − (economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery) — Σ (value × weight) ($/yr)\n"
)
print(_diff_tbl)
```

```{python}
#| label: diff-over-cos-ratio-table

# Fourth table: (third ÷ first) × 100 = (diff ÷ total_delivery_cos) as a percent.
_ratio_rows: list[dict] = []
for diff_row, cos_row in zip(_diff_rows, _rows, strict=True):
    assert diff_row["group"] == cos_row["group"]
    denom = cos_row["total_delivery_cos"]
    num = diff_row["diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos"]
    if denom == 0:
        pct = float("nan")
    else:
        pct = round(num / denom * 100, 2)
    _ratio_rows.append({
        "group": diff_row["group"],
        "pct_diff_div_delivery_cos": pct,
    })

_ratio_tbl = pl.DataFrame(_ratio_rows)
print(
    "\n (table 3) ÷ (table 1) = diff ÷ total_delivery_cos — percent (%)\n"
)
print(_ratio_tbl)
```

## Combined summary (Great Tables)

```{python}
#| label: delivery-summary-gt

_merged = (
    pl.DataFrame(_rows)
    .join(pl.DataFrame(_rows_bill), on="group")
    .join(pl.DataFrame(_diff_rows), on="group")
    .join(pl.DataFrame(_ratio_rows), on="group")
    .with_columns(pl.col("pct_diff_div_delivery_cos").fill_nan(None))
)

_delivery_summary_gt = (
    GT(_merged, rowname_col="group")
    .tab_header(
        title="Delivery bill vs. delivery cost of service — weighted totals by subgroup",
        subtitle="Run 1+2 BAT outputs; Σ denotes sum of (value × ResStock weight).",
    )
    .tab_spanner(
        label="Σ (value × weight), $/yr",
        columns=[
            "total_delivery_cos",
            "total_annual_bill_delivery",
            "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos",
        ],
    )
    .tab_spanner(
        label="Ratio",
        columns=["pct_diff_div_delivery_cos"],
    )
    .cols_label(
        total_delivery_cos="Delivery COS",
        total_annual_bill_delivery="Annual delivery bill",
        diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos="Bill − COS",
        pct_diff_div_delivery_cos="(Bill − COS) ÷ COS",
    )
    .fmt_currency(
        columns=[
            "total_delivery_cos",
            "total_annual_bill_delivery",
            "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos",
        ],
        decimals=0,
    )
    .fmt_number(columns="pct_diff_div_delivery_cos", decimals=1, pattern="{x}%")
    .sub_missing(missing_text="—")
    .cols_align(
        align="right",
        columns=[
            "total_delivery_cos",
            "total_annual_bill_delivery",
            "diff_annual_bill_minus_delivery_cos",
            "pct_diff_div_delivery_cos",
        ],
    )
    .tab_source_note(
        "Delivery COS = economic_burden_delivery + residual_share_delivery. "
        "Annual delivery bill = annual_bill_delivery. "
        "Ratio = (Bill − COS) ÷ delivery COS (×100 as %).",
    )
)

_delivery_summary_gt
```
